title: We're Parents Who See Pain in Alberta's 'Parental Rights' Law
author: Corinne Mason, Leah Hamilton
notes: Published in The Tyee, originally from The Conversation. MRU researchers document impact of anti-LGBTQ2S+ legislation on families of queer youth in Alberta. Smith announced policies Feb 2024; legislation expected in fall 2024 session (aligns with EVT-033 Dec 2024 passage). Research finds: trans children missing school, self-harm, anxiety. US parallel: anti-trans legislation linked to 72% increase in suicide attempts among trans youth. Anchors EVT-032/033 context.
